data.content:
Plan complete. The likely fix is to make Queue/Active reserve terminal-aware bottom inset space from the existing terminal store state instead of letting the fixed terminal panel/minimized bar shrink the usable viewport without affecting list layout. Keep scope on Queue/Active list layout, prefer a single helper for open/minimized/closed inset derivation, and validate the actual scroll owner in-browser with `scrollTop`/`scrollHeight`/`clientHeight` across all three terminal states.

Child knots created:
- `foolery-4dfd` implementation
- `foolery-3a5e` regression coverage and browser verification
